name: Chemistry Experiment Monitor
description: Monitor an ongoing chemistry experiment every 15 minutes. Detect visual changes, log observations, and generate a final report when the experiment ends.
goal: Capture the current state of the chemistry experiment. Compare with the previous observation to detect significant changes (color change, precipitate formation, gas evolution, volume change). Record temperature data. Save a timestamped observation summary. If a significant change is detected, send an immediate Feishu alert.
constraints: Always save an observation summary via storage.save_summary with category 'chem_experiment'
Only call notify.feishu_send if a significant visual change is detected compared to the previous frame
Do not include raw image data in any notification or summary — text description only
Include timestamp in every summary entry
